name: realtime-devtools-search
prompt: Staff or senior engineer with React, TypeScript, developer tools, and realtime collaboration experience. Open source and product taste are both important.
notes: Maya should usually win because she combines React, realtime, and developer tools with clear evidence.

name: infra-heavy-search
prompt: Principal or staff engineer with distributed systems, infrastructure, and backend architecture depth. Open source systems work matters more than UI polish.
notes: Julian should usually rank first because the evidence most strongly matches distributed systems depth.
